name: Western Frontier Justice
description: Preset Western Frontier Justice with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: A border town asks for justice where law has failed.
text_areas.setting: Frontier settlements between rail expansion and outlaw territory.
text_areas.main_objective: Build a coalition to remove a violent extraction cartel.
text_areas.stakes: The cartel controls water and starves the region into submission.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
